{{CargoRelic
|name=The 1st Electric Fan
|class_id=22407
|rank=Blue
|affct=FAME
|birthday=12-17
|source=Lottery Machine No.3 (0.06%)
|description=On Dec 17, 1880 AD, Schule successfully made the world's first electric fan.<br>An engineer named Byron created a spring-driven mechanical fan 50 years before the electric fan was invented. This fan is considered the prototype for the electric fan. Later, Schule improved it by replacing the spring with a motor, which officially introduced the electric fan and gave people relief from the summer heat.
|fame=44
|art=27
|fth=22
|civ=30
|tech=31
|ss1=Refine +1 White Rebel Material +1%
|ss2=Refine +1 White Rebel Material +2%
|ss3=Refine +1 White Rebel Material +3%
|ss4=Refine +1 White Rebel Material +5%
|ss7=Refine +1 White Rebel Material +5%<br>Refine +1 White Rebel Material +5% (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Goldfish skill I.png|50px]]Place in Goldfish Biozilla: In Species War, Troop Fire DMG +10
}}
